endpoints.name: GET /v1/attributes
endpoints.description: Returns the list of attributes that would be available for a location with the given primary category and country.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/categories
endpoints.description: Returns a list of business categories. Search will match the category name but not the category ID. Search only matches the front of a category name (that is, 'food' may return 'Food Court' but not 'Fast Food Restaurant').

endpoints.name: GET /v1/categories:batchGet
endpoints.description: Returns a list of business categories for the provided language and GConcept ids.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/chains:search
endpoints.description: Searches the chain based on chain name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/googleLocations:search
endpoints.description: Search all of the possible locations that are a match to the specified request.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Looks up all the attributes set for a given location.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Deletes a location. If this location cannot be deleted using the API and it is marked so in the `google.mybusiness.businessinformation.v1.LocationState`, use the [Google Business Profile](https://business.google.com/manage/) website.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Update attributes for a given location.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{name}:associate
endpoints.description: Associates a location to a place ID. Any previous association is overwritten. This operation is only valid if the location is unverified. The association must be valid, that is, it appears in the list of `SearchGoogleLocations`.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{name}:clearLocationAssociation
endpoints.description: Clears an association between a location and its place ID. This operation is only valid if the location is unverified.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{name}:getGoogleUpdated
endpoints.description: Gets the Google-updated version of the specified location.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/locations
endpoints.description: Lists the locations for the specified account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/locations
endpoints.description: Creates a new Location that will be owned by the logged in user.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.
